YOUR SITE. YOUR RULES.

When Socially Awkward Media builds your website, you own it. Full stop.

No hostage situations here. If you ever decide to part ways, we'll make sure you walk away with everything you paid for — your site, your content, your brand. Clean and simple.

We believe in empowering small businesses, not creating dependency. You're a client, not a prisoner.

BUNDLE

Book a website and logo together — save $200.

DISCOUNTS

Active first responders receive 10% off all services. Valid ID required.

Socially Awkward Media is a veteran-owned business. Military veterans may qualify for special discounts — contact Theia directly for details. Valid ID required.

Website Tier 1

$1,500
  • ✓ Up to 5 pages
  • ✓ Contact form
  • ✓ Mobile friendly
  • ✓ Basic SEO setup
  • ✓ 2 rounds of revisions pre-launch

Website Tier 2

$4,500
  • ✓ Up to 10 pages
  • ✓ Contact form + 2 additional forms
  • ✓ Mobile friendly
  • ✓ Gallery or portfolio section
  • ✓ Booking/calendar integration
  • ✓ Basic SEO setup
  • ✓ 2 rounds of revisions pre-launch

Shop Starter

$7,000
  • ✓ Everything in Tier 2
  • ✓ Online store setup
  • ✓ Payment gateway integration
  • ✓ Up to 49 products loaded at launch
  • ✓ 2 rounds of revisions pre-launch

Shop Full

$8,500
  • ✓ Everything in Shop Starter
  • ✓ Up to 100 products loaded at launch

Logo Standard

$350
  • ✓ 1 logo concept
  • ✓ PNG, JPG, PDF files
  • ✓ 1 revision round

Logo + Brand Kit

$750
  • ✓ Up to 3 logo concepts
  • ✓ PNG, JPG, PDF, SVG files
  • ✓ Color + black & white versions
  • ✓ Brand guide document
  • ✓ 2 revision rounds

Maintenance Basic

$175/mo
  • ✓ Security updates
  • ✓ Backups
  • ✓ Performance checks
  • ✓ Hosting management

Maintenance Priority

$250/mo
  • ✓ Everything in Basic
  • ✓ 2 content updates per month
  • ✓ Priority queue

ADDITIONAL RATES

  • Post-launch edits $75/hr, 1hr minimum
  • 48hr rush $100/hr, 1hr minimum
  • 24hr rush $150/hr, 1hr minimum
  • Additional products beyond 100 $75/hr
  • Extra logo revision (Standard) $75 flat
  • Extra logo revision (Brand Kit) $50 flat

REVISION POLICY

Every project includes 2 rounds of revisions before launch. A revision round means one consolidated list of changes submitted at a time — not a running stream of individual requests. This keeps the process clean and efficient for both of us.

A revision is not a redesign. Adding new pages, new features, or starting a section over from scratch falls outside revision scope and will be quoted separately.

Additional pre-launch revision rounds beyond the included 2 are billed at $75/hr with a 1 hour minimum.

Once your site launches, all changes are billed at $75/hr with a 1 hour minimum. Need it faster? Rush rates apply — $100/hr for 48 hour turnaround, $150/hr for 24 hour turnaround.

Here to help!
